content:
The v5.9.3-beta3 tag is available.

The Flatpak build is done but waits to be published: https://buildbot.flathub.org/#/builders/6/builds/135576

The Ubuntu branches ubuntu/focal, ubuntu/jammy and ubuntu/numbat are ready to be pushed. Test builds at https://launchpad.net/~leamas-alec/+archive/ubuntu/foo

Working with the Debian stuff, back later

The debian packages are available but untested at http://mumin.crabdance.com/bookworm-backports/

Will try to find some time to test later today, but signing off for now.

@Alec Leamas
debuild for focal fails.

$ debuild --no-lintian -S -sa -k4A57DDF4719374E5A8FD2637E5216EEB1ACFED1D

dpkg-buildpackage -us -uc -ui -S -sa
dpkg-buildpackage: info: source package opencpn
dpkg-buildpackage: info: source version 1:5.9.3~beta3+dfsg-1ubuntu1~bpo2004+1
dpkg-buildpackage: info: source distribution focal
dpkg-buildpackage: info: source changed by Alec Leamas <leamas.alec@gmail.com>
dpkg-source --before-build .
debian/rules clean
dh clean
dh_clean
dpkg-source -b .
dpkg-source: warning: Version number suggests Ubuntu changes, but Maintainer: does not have Ubuntu address
dpkg-source: warning: Version number suggests Ubuntu changes, but there is no XSBC-Original-Maintainer field
dpkg-source: info: using source format '3.0 (quilt)'
dpkg-source: info: building opencpn using existing ./opencpn_5.9.3~beta3+dfsg.orig.tar.xz
dpkg-source: info: using patch list from debian/patches/series
dpkg-source: info: local changes detected, the modified files are:
OpenCPN/CMakeLists.txt
OpenCPN/cmake/in-files/config.h.in
OpenCPN/test/buffer_tests.cpp
dpkg-source: error: aborting due to unexpected upstream changes, see /tmp/opencpn_5.9.3~beta3+dfsg-1ubuntu1~bpo2004+1.diff.Z2EzLD
dpkg-source: info: Hint: make sure the version in debian/changelog matches the unpacked source tree
dpkg-source: info: you can integrate the local changes with dpkg-source --commit
dpkg-buildpackage: error: dpkg-source -b . subprocess returned exit status 2
debuild: fatal error at line 1182:
dpkg-buildpackage -us -uc -ui -S -sa failed

Works for me. Attaching log, note the state of all branches and tags. Anything which differs?

al@focal:~$ cd OpenCPN/OpenCPN/
al@focal:~/OpenCPN/OpenCPN$ git branch
  debian/sid
  focal-backports
  old
  patch-queue/focal-backports
  pristine-tar
* ubuntu/focal
  ubuntu/jammy
  ubuntu/numbat
  upstream/latest
al@focal:~/OpenCPN/OpenCPN$ git rev-parse HEAD
815bf583c5ecb2a34e602406ab785619fff15ba6

al@focal:~/OpenCPN/OpenCPN$ git rev-parse upstream/latest
325cac555ea76971b2642b975b72a6f67e791452

al@focal:~/OpenCPN/OpenCPN$ git rev-parse pristine-tar
962d28ca5f162b13a49c327c35cdda6172a965b3

al@focal:~/OpenCPN/OpenCPN$ git rev-parse upstream/5.9.3_beta3+dfsg
938e8849eceb24f73e34f6f827e1b98fd7621937

al@focal:~/OpenCPN/OpenCPN$ git rev-parse v5.9.3-beta3
9d702359580399c278c521201a00e1fb9eb872db


al@focal:~/OpenCPN/OpenCPN$ git clean -fxd; git checkout .
Removing debian/files
Updated 0 paths from the index

al@focal:~/OpenCPN/OpenCPN$ debuild --no-lintian -S -kE2EA41DCE2F8A99AD17A1E463A67D5D966D15C5C
 dpkg-buildpackage -us -uc -ui -S
dpkg-buildpackage: info: source package opencpn

Now signing changes and any dsc files...
 signfile dsc opencpn_5.9.3~beta3+dfsg-1ubuntu1~bpo2004+1.dsc E2EA41DCE2F8A99AD17A1E463A67D5D966D15C5C

 fixup_buildinfo opencpn_5.9.3~beta3+dfsg-1ubuntu1~bpo2004+1.dsc opencpn_5.9.3~beta3+dfsg-1ubuntu1~bpo2004+1_source.buildinfo

@Alec Leamas
Ahh. Here was the magic git line missing.

git clean -fxd; git checkout .

What does "git checkout ." actually do? I was having a hard time getting the correct checkout of ubuntu/focal at the correct tag.

debuild OK now.

Now trouble with jammy.

$ git rev-parse HEAD
ccf965d12b23202d7483cc0577b325718d49a629

$ debuild --no-lintian -S -sa -k4A57DDF4719374E5A8FD2637E5216EEB1ACFED1D
debuild: found debian/changelog for package opencpn in the directory
  /home/dsr/Projects/opencpn/OpenCPN
but this directory name does not match the package name according to the
regex  PACKAGE(-.+)?.
On phone. Git checkout . Resets all changed files I. E. The diff becomes zero
Jammy looks weird. Put it aside for now until I'm home in an hour or so
